# Copilot Instructions

Follow all rules defined in:

- AGENTS.md

AGENTS.md is the canonical engineering governance document for this repository.

Before generating code:

- inspect existing patterns
- preserve architecture boundaries
- maintain tenant safety
- reuse established conventions
- avoid unrelated refactors

Prefer:

- explicit implementations
- readable code
- focused modules
- maintainable structures

Avoid introducing new architectural patterns unless explicitly required.
